description_long: This is a white ceramic mug with a large, rounded handle and a glossy finish. The exterior is decorated with a colorful wraparound print featuring bold text, silhouettes of people, and a sunset gradient background. The main text reads '2nd Friendly Fun Shoot 2018' in red and white, accompanied by smaller event details and a fundraising tagline. One side of the mug displays a stylized figure in a helmet, while the opposite side shows hands forming a heart shape around a globe and flag. The mug's interior is plain white, and the overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, suitable for promotional or commemorative use.
description: A glossy white ceramic mug with a large handle, featuring a colorful event-themed print and bold text wrapping around its exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main event text '2nd Friendly Fun Shoot 2018' with silhouettes and a sunset background.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large white handle and a stylized figure in a helmet on the print.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displays hands forming a heart around a globe and flag, with part of the event text visible.
description_view_3: Back view focuses on the hands and globe motif, with the start of the event text and a portion of the sunset background.
